text: A woman dressed in black with a black umbrella  talking to a woman in a purple tank top.
Men drinking and playing a Wii while watching baseball.
A male student in cap and gown chats on his cell phone.
Three sheep lay on a country lane while a fourth stands.
A kite flying above the heads of a crowd in a park
A man riding skis down a snow covered slope.
A deserted bench along the path in the park.
A cat sits on a motorcycle seat and looks backwards.
A rectangular toilet in a stall with the lid up.
A big comfortable chair in front of a flat screen TV.
